page_content:
Prerequisite: ENFP312.

ENFP649 Special Problems (1-3 Credits)

Advanced topics selected by the faculty from the current literature to suit the special needs and background of students, or for individual students who have definite plans of individual study.

Restriction: Must be in ENGR: MS Only-Fire Protection Engineering (Master's) program; and permission of instructor; and permission of ENGR-Fire Protection Engineering department.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
